description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design. The headband is arched and appears to be made of glossy black plastic, with a subtle red accent lining the inner side. The ear cups are circular and padded, likely covered in a soft synthetic material for comfort, and are attached to the headband with robust hinges. The ear cups have a textured pattern on the outer surface, adding a touch of style and possibly improving grip. The headphones do not display any visible wires, suggesting a wireless design, and there are no obvious control buttons or branding visible. The overall construction looks lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones with a glossy black headband, red inner lining, and padded ear cups.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both padded ear cups and the red inner lining of the headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular ear cup and the glossy black headband arch.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband's curve.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other ear cup and the headband's glossy finish.
